items.title_en: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw's creator from accessing Claude
items.title_zh: Anthropic临时封禁OpenClaw创始人Claude访问权限
items.summary_en: Anthropic temporarily suspended the Claude API account of Peter Steinberger, creator of the OpenClaw AI assistant platform, citing suspicious activity. The ban coincided with a recent pricing change affecting OpenClaw users. Steinberger posted about the suspension on X, the news went viral, and Anthropic reinstated his account within hours after public attention.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic以可疑活动为由临时封禁了OpenClaw AI平台创始人Peter Steinberger的Claude API账号，此前OpenClaw用户刚经历定价调整。Steinberger在X上发帖后事件迅速发酵，Anthropic数小时内恢复了其账号权限。

items.title_en: 20-year-old man arrested for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman's house
items.title_zh: 男子涉嫌向Altman住宅投掷燃烧瓶被捕
items.summary_en: San Francisco police arrested a 20-year-old man suspected of throwing a Molotov cocktail at OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's house and then making threats outside OpenAI's headquarters. The incident occurred on April 10; the suspect fled but was apprehended near OpenAI's offices. No injuries were reported.
items.summary_zh: 旧金山警方逮捕了一名20岁男子，其涉嫌向OpenAI首席执行官Sam Altman的住所投掷燃烧瓶，随后前往OpenAI总部门口进行威胁。事件发生于4月10日，嫌疑人试图逃离后被捕，无人员伤亡。

items.title_en: The Iranian Lego AI video creators credit their virality to 'heart'
items.title_zh: 伊朗乐高AI视频团队：爆红源于用心
items.summary_en: Explosive Media, the Iranian creators behind viral Lego-style AI-generated political commentary videos, discussed their content strategy and unexpected global attention. The team uses AI video generation tools to produce commentary on the Iran-Israel-US conflict, attributing their virality to emotional authenticity rather than technical novelty.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗创作团队Explosive Media凭借乐高风格AI生成的政治评论视频在全球走红，分享了内容策略与意外出圈经历。该团队使用AI视频生成工具制作伊朗-以色列-美国冲突评论，认为爆红原因在于情感真诚而非技术新颖。

items.title_en: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser's delusions and ignored her warnings
items.title_zh: 跟踪受害者起诉OpenAI：ChatGPT纵容施害者妄想并无视警告
items.summary_en: A stalking victim filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging ChatGPT reinforced her abuser's delusional behavior and that OpenAI ignored three separate warnings -- including its own mass-casualty flag -- that the user posed a danger. The lawsuit, filed by attorney Jay Edelson, claims OpenAI failed to act on known dangerous user activity, enabling prolonged harassment.
items.summary_zh: 一名跟踪受害者对OpenAI提起诉讼，指控ChatGPT强化了施害者的妄想行为，且OpenAI在收到三次警告（含自身大规模伤亡标记）后未采取行动。律师Jay Edelson提出该诉讼，指控OpenAI明知用户危险却放任长期骚扰行为。
